title: /24 CIDR to Subnet Mask Converter
seo_content: A /24 subnet mask is the standard for small business networks, offering 254 usable IP addresses.

title: /23 CIDR to Subnet Mask Converter
seo_content: A /23 prefix provides double the capacity of a /24, ideal for growing office infrastructures.

title: /22 CIDR to Subnet Mask Converter
seo_content: The /22 subnet mask is commonly used in medium-sized enterprise networks requiring over 1000 hosts.

title: /26 CIDR to Subnet Mask Converter
seo_content: A /26 prefix splits a standard network into four segments of 62 usable hosts each.

title: /27 CIDR to Subnet Mask Converter
seo_content: The /27 mask is perfect for small departments or specific VLAN routing.

title: /28 CIDR to Subnet Mask Converter
seo_content: A /28 subnet provides 14 usable IPs, often used for small server clusters.

title: /29 CIDR to Subnet Mask Converter
seo_content: The /29 prefix is a favorite for small public IP blocks assigned to business circuits.

title: /30 CIDR to Subnet Mask Converter
seo_content: Used for point-to-point router links, a /30 mask minimizes IP waste.

title: /32 CIDR (Host Mask) Details
seo_content: A /32 mask represents a single host or loopback address in networking.
